issue_summary: add total TF tracking to HighFreqTerms tool
javadoc_before: /** * HighFreqTerms class extracts terms and their frequencies out * of an existing Lucene index. */
javadoc_after: /** * * HighFreqTerms class extracts the top n most frequent terms * (by document frequency ) from an existing Lucene index and reports their document frequencey. * If the -t flag is and reports both their document frequency and their total tf (total number of occurences) * in order of highest total tf */
